sql_array: CREATE TABLE rectangles (id UInt64, lowPoint UInt64, highPoint UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT s2RectIntersection(lowPoint, highPoint, 5179062030687166815, 5177056748191934217) AS rectIntersection FROM rectangles WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE rectangles SET highPoint = 5178000000000000000 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT s2RectIntersection(lowPoint, highPoint, 5179000000000000000, 5178000000000000000) AS rectIntersection FROM rectangles;
